languages.original_text: "I have already transferred the basic Rite of Operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can be performed without my participation."

languages.text: "Я уже передал основные ритуалы эксплуатации квалифицированному контингенту Сектора Бионика. Если вы откажете нам с Нунциусом, то мы задержимся ровно настолько, чтобы передать остальные знания, после чего покинем ваше судно. Процедуры аугментации смогут свершаться без моего участия".

"I have already transferred the basic Rite of Operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can be performed without my participation."
languages.original_text: "Я уже передал основные ритуалы эксплуатации квалифицированному контингенту Сектора Бионика. Если вы откажете нам с Нунциусом, то мы задержимся ровно настолько, чтобы передать остальные знания, после чего покинем ваше судно. Процедуры аугментации смогут свершаться без моего участия".

If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can take place without my participation."

"I have already transferred the basic rituals of operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge to our tech-comrades on board, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can take place without my participation."

"I have already transferred the basic rituals of operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. "I have already transferred the basic Rite of Operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can be performed without my participation."

languages.text: 「私はすでに、セクター・ビオニカの資格のある部隊に、基本的な手術の儀式を伝授しました。もし拒否されるなら、ヌンシウスと私は、残りの知識を船内の技術仲間たちに伝授するのに十分な時間だけ滞在し、その後は離船します。増幅手術は、私の参加なしに実施できます」
languages.original_text: "I have already transferred the basic rituals of operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge to our tech-comrades on board, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can take place without my participation."

languages.text: "Ich habe die Basisrituale für den Betrieb bereits zu einem qualifizierten Kontingent im Sektor Bionica transferiert. Solltet Ihr uns abweisen, werden Nuncius und ich bleiben, bis wir den Rest unseres Wissens weitergegeben haben. Danach werden wir das Schiff verlassen. Die Augmentierungsprozedur kann auch ohne mein Beisein durchgeführt werden."
languages.original_text: "I have already transferred the basic Rite of Operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can be performed without my participation."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe die Basisrituale für den Betrieb bereits zu einem qualifizierten Kontingent im Sektor Bionica transferiert. Solltet Ihr uns abweisen, werden Nuncius und ich bleiben, bis wir den Rest unseres Wissens weitergegeben haben. Danach werden wir das Schiff verlassen. Die Augmentierungsprozedur kann auch ohne mein Beisein durchgeführt werden."

languages.text: «Ya he transferido el Rito de Operación básico al personal cualificado del Sector Bionica. Si nos rechaza, Nuncius y yo nos quedaremos el tiempo suficiente para transmitir el resto de nuestros conocimientos, tras lo cual procederemos a desembarcar. Los procedimientos de implantación de aumentos podrán tener lugar sin mi participación».
languages.original_text: "I have already transferred the basic Rite of Operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can be performed without my participation."

traits.locale_text: «Ya he transferido el Rito de Operación básico al personal cualificado del Sector Bionica. Si nos rechaza, Nuncius y yo nos quedaremos el tiempo suficiente para transmitir el resto de nuestros conocimientos, tras lo cual procederemos a desembarcar. Los procedimientos de implantación de aumentos podrán tener lugar sin mi participación».

languages.text: "Temel Faaliyet Ayini'ni Sektör Biyonika'daki yetkili bir birliğe çoktan aktardım. Bizi reddederseniz Nuncius ve ben; irfanımızın kalanını aktaracak kadar kalacağız, ardından gemiden ayrılacağız. Ogmentasyon prosedürleri benim katılımım olmadan da gerçekleştirilebilir."
languages.original_text: "I have already transferred the basic Rite of Operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can be performed without my participation."

traits.locale_text: "Temel Faaliyet Ayini'ni Sektör Biyonika'daki yetkili bir birliğe çoktan aktardım. Bizi reddederseniz Nuncius ve ben; irfanımızın kalanını aktaracak kadar kalacağız, ardından gemiden ayrılacağız. Ogmentasyon prosedürleri benim katılımım olmadan da gerçekleştirilebilir."

languages.text: « J'ai déjà transféré le Rite d'Opération de base à un contingent qualifié du secteur Bionica. Si vous refusez notre aide, Nuncius et moi prendrons néanmoins le temps de transmettre le reste de nos connaissances avant de débarquer. Ma présence n'est pas requise pour effectuer les différentes procédures d'augmentation. »
languages.original_text: "I have already transferred the basic Rite of Operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can be performed without my participation."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai déjà transféré le Rite d'Opération de base à un contingent qualifié du secteur Bionica. Si vous refusez notre aide, Nuncius et moi prendrons néanmoins le temps de transmettre le reste de nos connaissances avant de débarquer. Ma présence n'est pas requise pour effectuer les différentes procédures d'augmentation. »

languages.text: “我已将基本的操作仪典传授给了仿生区一支合格的小队。若您回绝我们，努恩修斯与我只会停留必要的时间，将剩余知识倾囊相授，随后便离舰。植入物程序无需我的参与亦可进行。”
languages.original_text: "I have already transferred the basic Rite of Operation to a qualified contingent in the Sector Bionica. If you refuse us, Nuncius and I will linger just long enough to pass on the rest of our knowledge, after which we will disembark. The augmentation procedures can be performed without my participation."
